title: Style Style Thaan Lyrics Baasha
stanzas:
Style Style Thaan Song Lyrics #Baasha
#SPB #KSChithra #Deva # Vairamuthu

Style-u style-u thaan
idhu super style-u thaan
un style-u ketha mayilu
naanuthaan (2)

oh touchu touchu
touchu touchu enna
touchu ne

oh kichu kichu
kichu kichu enna
kichu ne

yaezhu manikku maela
naanum inba latchumi

Figure-u figure-u thaan
nee super figure-u thaan
indha figure-u kaetha
minor naanuthaan(2)

ah touchu touchu
touchu touchu enna
touchu me

ah kichu kichu
kichu kichu enna
kichu me

yaezhu manikku maela
neeyum inba latchumi

Style-u style-u thaan
idhu super style-u thaan
un style-u ketha mayilu
naanuthaan

kadhalicha kavidhai varum
kandukonden pennaale.
karuppum or azhagu
kandukonden unnaale.

enengae shock adikkum
arindhu konden pennaale.
engengae thael kadikkum
therindhu konden unnaale.

kashmir rojave
kaiku vandhaaye
mondhu paakkumunne
mulleduthu kuththaadhe

azhagu rajave
avasaram aagaathe
mottu malarum munne
mutti mutti suthaathe.

adi raathiri varave
en ragasiya selave
oru kaathadichadhu
serthanaikkanum
kaathiru nilave.

Style-u style-u thaan
idhu super style-u thaan
un style-u ketha mayilu
naanuthaan

Figure-u figure-u thaan
nee super figure-u thaan
indha figure-u kaetha
minor naanuthaan

pachcharisi pallazhagaa
pal sirippil kolladhe
azhagumani thaerazhagi
asaiyavitte kollaathe

netri thodum
mudi azhagaa
ottrai mudi thaaraayo

kaththai malar
kuzhal azhagi
oththai malar thaarayo

ange theendaathe
aasai thoondaathe
summa kendantha
sangai oodhi vittu pogathe

oodal kollaathe
ullam thaangaathe
thalaivi kaaichal kondaal
thalaiyanaiyum thoongaathe

ada kettadhu manasu
vandhu muttudhu vayasu
unnai partha pozhudhu
vertha pengalil
nana oru dhinusu.

Style-u style-u thaan
idhu super style-u thaan
un style-u ketha mayilu
naanuthaan

Figure-u figure-u thaan
nee super figure-u thaan
indha figure-u kaetha
minor naanuthaan

oh touchu touchu
touchu touchu enna
touchu ne

ah kichu kichu
kichu kichu enna
kichu me

yaezhu manikku maela
naanum inba latchumi

Style-u style-u thaan
idhu super style-u thaan
un style-u ketha mayilu
naanuthaan
varave va.

nee super figure-u thaan
indha figure-u kaetha

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song celebrates personal style and confidence, emphasizing the joy of expressing oneself.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Baasha.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singers SP Balasubrahmanyam and K.S. Chithra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Style Style Thaan was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released on January 12, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Baasha, Style Style Thaan serves as a lively anthem that showcases the protagonist's charisma and flair. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration between SP Balasubrahmanyam and K.S. Chithra brings an infectious energy that resonates with audiences. Overall, the song encapsulates the essence of self-expression and confidence.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Style Style Thaan from the iconic Baasha is a vibrant celebration of style and energy, featuring the legendary voices of SP Balasubrahmanyam and K.S. Chithra. This upbeat duet, composed by Deva, captures the essence of fun and flair, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the infectious rhythm and let the catchy lyrics elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: This is super style, your style is like a beautiful deer, I am saying this.
Oh, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch you are.
Oh, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle you are.
I am also a joy above seven stars.
This is super figure, your figure is like a beautiful figure, I am saying this.
Ah, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch you are to me.
Ah, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle you are to me.
You are also a joy above seven stars.
This is super style, your style is like a beautiful deer, I am saying this.
When I fell in love, I found poetry, because of you, I found beauty.
I realized where the shock would hit me, because of you, I understood where the oil would spill.
Oh, Kashmir rose, you came to my hand, don't dance in front of me.
Beautiful king, don't let the moment pass, don't let the flower bloom and fall before you.
That night, my secret will come, a moon that will shine on a hidden path.
This is super style, your style is like a beautiful deer, I am saying this.
This is super figure, your figure is like a beautiful figure, I am saying this.
Don't let the green rice be spoiled, don't let the beautiful one lose its charm.
Will the beautiful hair be tied up nicely?
Will the flower be tied up nicely?
Don't go there, don't let the desire wander, don't let the song that was sung go away.
Don't let the anger take over, don't let the heart be restless, if the leader shows up, even the head will not sleep.
When I see you, my heart melts, in the eyes of other girls, you are a unique beauty.
This is super style, your style is like a beautiful deer, I am saying this.
This is super figure, your figure is like a beautiful figure, I am saying this.
Oh, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch, what a touch you are.
Ah, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle, what a tickle you are to me.
I am also a joy above seven stars.
This is super style, your style is like a beautiful deer, I am saying this.
Come on, come on.
This is super figure, your figure is like a beautiful figure, I am saying this.
